name: Grid

values.comment: Creates a grid with given size width, height, x- and y-offset.

values.comment: Creates a grid with given List of row- and col-indexes, size, x- and y-offset.
values.type: List Int -> List Int -> ( Float, Float ) -> Float -> Float -> Grid

name: Row

values.name: createBox
values.comment: Creates a box with given row, col, size, x- and y-offset.

name: Position

values.name: fromBox
values.comment: Convert from Box to (row, col)

values.name: fromBoxes

name: Coordinate

values.name: fromBox
values.comment: Create a List of (x,y) coordinates with given size.

values.name: fromBoxes
values.comment: Convert all boxes in list from Box to (x, y) coordinates

values.name: getX
values.comment: Get the x-position for given row, size and x-offset.

values.name: getY
values.comment: Get the y-position for given col, size and y-offset.

values.name: topX
values.comment: Get the given position with x-offset.

values.name: topY
values.comment: Get the given position with y-offset.

values.name: transform
values.comment: Transform given coordinates with position (x, y) and scale.
values.type: ( Float, Float ) -> Float -> ( Float, Float ) -> ( Float, Float )

values.name: transformOffset
values.comment: Transform given coordinates with position (x, y) scale, x- and y-offset.
values.type: ( Float, Float ) -> ( Float, Float ) -> Float -> ( Float, Float ) -> ( Float, Float )

name: Box

aliases.name: Box
aliases.comment: A grid box with position (x,y) at row and col with size.

values.name: makeBox
values.comment: Creates a box with position (x,y) at row and col with given size.
